parsed_review.summary: CP00-207 is a descriptor-only synthetic-fixture-workflow closeout pack (RP06.P02.M06.S06-S15, risk A, 10 units). Independent read-only inspection via Read/Grep/Glob of the 8 active implementation refs in changed-file-scope.json confirms the pack's production-readiness boundary is honestly supported: (1) Descriptor-only/synthetic-only enforcement — freezeCp207Result() in packages/dms/src/service.js injects synthetic_only:true, no_real_data:true and ~50 runtime/dispatch/expose flags=false; createDmsCoreCp207SyntheticFixtureWorkflow* builders are pure Object.freeze constructions with no fs/network/DB I/O; all identifiers are synthetic transforms (e.g. dms-core-cp198-synthetic-audit). (2) No-write/no-leak — DMS_CORE_CP207_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION spreads CP198->CP206 and adds CP207 false flags; idempotency/lock/state/persistence/validation/permission/audit/raw-payload material is excluded; validateDmsCoreCp207SyntheticFixtureWorkflowDescriptor() in validators.js exhaustively asserts every descriptor-only/no-leak flag, the contract projection match, and the handoff target. (3) Authority boundary holds — claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true; the Claude review packet is read_only:true with allowed_tools Read/Grep/Glob; runtime opening is correctly deferred to CP00-208. (4) Hermes confined to control plane — createDmsCoreCp207HermesEvidencePacket() yields a production_ready_candidate (coverage.valid && workflow.valid), an evidence-packet/receipt descriptor, not product runtime; receipt_shape is descriptor_only_synthetic_fixture_workflow_no_write. (5) Contract (contracts/dms-core-contract.json), README, test/model.test.js, and validate-rp06 script all mirror the service projection. The pack makes NO production_ready=true claim (manifest/command-evidence/inspection are pending by design at this read_only_claude_run_raw_capture step). Review evidence is valid: auth_preflight passed (exit 0, well-formed JSON), prompt non-summary-only, no forbidden tools, no auth-failure/0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped output. No P0/P1/P2. One P3 reviewer-limitation finding recorded. This verdict is an independent read-only review input only — not final approval, production sign-off, or an enterprise-trust claim.

findings.title: Local validation command-execution evidence not yet recorded (gated to post-review final closeout)
findings.details: command-evidence.json records commands:[] with status:"pending" and gate_outcome:"pending" (the Hermes H06 gate is likewise pending), and the manifest/construction-inspection still carry production_ready:false with empty tests_and_validation.commands. This is the expected state at the read_only_claude_run_raw_capture step, since the Claude review is itself the gating input that unblocks downstream adjudication/inspection/final_closeout_validation. As a read-only reviewer constrained to Read/Grep/Glob, I cannot execute the 11 declared validation commands, so local/Hermes validation-pass was verified statically (test/model.test.js CP207 assertions, validateDmsCoreCp207Coverage/validateDmsCoreCp207SyntheticFixtureWorkflowDescriptor logic, and the contract projection match) rather than executionally.
findings.recommendation: At the post-review final_closeout_validation step, execute the 11 declared validation commands, populate command-evidence.json with the executed receipts, and confirm all are green before commit/closeout.
findings.post_review_disposition: deferred_to_final_closeout_validation_step — by design and non-blocking for the read-only review verdict
